nasb.text: Again there was war at Gath, where there was a man of great stature who had twenty-four fingers and toes, six fingers on each hand and six toes on each foot; and he also was descended from the giants.

esv.text: And there was again war at Gath, where there was a man of great stature, who had six fingers on each hand and six toes on each foot, twenty-four in number, and he also was descended from the giants.

cnv.text: 後來，在迦特又有戰事；那裡有一個身材高大的人，手腳各有六指，共有二十四根指頭；他也是巨人的兒子。

ccb.text: 此后，在迦特又起了战事，那里有个身材高大的人，是巨人的后代。他每只手脚各有六个手指和脚趾，共二十四个手指和脚趾。
